creator: kargl@troutmask.apl.washington.edu
text:
Two ports are included: f2c and a wrapper to call f2c+gcc.

* The f2c port includes the latest version from www.netlib.org,
  and it includes *all* FreeBSD enhancements prior to the inclusion
  of g77 into FreeBSD-current.  This port builds *ELF ONLY* libraries.

* The wrapper port by defaults generates a binary named fc (to avoid
  name collisions with g77) and a man page.
